terms.definition: An unordered collection of unique, hashable elements with O(1) average membership operations.
The immutable, hashable variant of set; suitable as a dict key or as an element of another set.
The set of elements present in either operand; `s | t` in Python.
The set of elements present in both operands; `s & t` in Python.
The set of elements in the first operand but not the second; `s - t` in Python.
The set of elements in exactly one operand; `s ^ t` in Python.
A set whose elements are all contained in (or contain all of) another set; `s <= t` and `s >= t`.
